message:
fix: resolve workspaceFolder mapping and shell execution issues

Critical fixes for Microsoft devcontainer compatibility:

- Implement workspaceFolder support (respect workspaceFolder from devcontainer.json)
- Fix shell escaping in signal handling script (use && for command chaining)
- Use absolute paths for all container executables (/bin/mkdir, /bin/sh, /bin/chown)
- Remove feature ContainerEnv from runtime flags (belongs in Dockerfile only)
- Fix PATH variable substitution issues

These changes enable:
- Proper workspace directory mapping per Microsoft specification
- Reliable container lifecycle with signal handling
- Correct PATH environment variable handling
- Microsoft devcontainer torture tests working correctly

Resolves workspaceFolder conflicts and shell execution failures.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -86,7 +86,7 @@ func (le *LifecycleExecutor) executeShellCommand(cmd string) error {
 		"exec",
 		"-u", le.containerUser,
 		le.containerName,
-		"sh", "-c", cmd,
+		"/bin/sh", "-c", cmd,
 	}
 
 	output, err := le.client.Run(args...)
